_comment: Verified commercial payers wired via their public FHIR Plan-Net Provider Directory (CMS-9115-F). Copy to payers.json and add the payers whose networks you want as VERIFIED filters. Each entry maps to a plan id the UI groups under `category`. Optional `payer` defaults to `id`; add `api_key_header`/`api_key` if the payer requires a free developer key. Payers you do NOT wire here still appear as clearly-labeled ESTIMATED filters from the curated catalog (app/catalog.py).
